name: Meeting Request
description: Request a meeting with clear value proposition
subject: Meeting Request: [Topic]
body:
Hi [Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I would like to schedule a meeting to discuss [Topic], as I believe it could deliver significant value to [Company/Team].

Would you be available on [Date] at [Time]? I'm flexible and happy to work around your schedule.

Key points I'd like to cover:
• [Point 1]
• [Point 2]
• [Point 3]

Looking forward to connecting.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
